steps.title: Find the retail price
steps.content:
The retail price is \(260\%\) of the \(5.00\) wholesale price.
\[2.60(5.00)=13.00\]

steps.title: Apply the discount
steps.content:
A \(70\%\) discount means the buyer pays the remaining \(30\%\) of the retail price.
\[0.30(13.00)=3.90\]
The answer is 3.90.
